title: More Visible Ores
description: "Tired of wasting time searching for diamonds in dark caves? This pack is made for you."
body: Have you ever spent hours mining and the diamonds just won’t show up? This pack is designed to change that. More Visible Ores visually enhances all in-game minerals —diamond, emerald, gold, iron, coal, redstone, lapis lazuli, and ancient debris— making them subtly glow in the dark without breaking Minecraft’s original aesthetic. Perfect for survival players, speedrunners, or content creators, this pack not only improves visibility in deep caves and abandoned mines, but also keeps game performance intact. All you need is to download OptiFine, enable the emissive textures option, and let the ores guide your way. ![MVO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3943e1a6c01a7a37cce95f724717a8c342d136a_0.webp)
